calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Samantha Childley, in pro per (via Zoom).

Ms. Childley stated that she's having financial issues and that is what's hindering her from retaining council. The matter is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Samantha Chidley, Petitioner in Pro Per.

The Court noted that multiple issues had been flagged by the probate examiner and had been communicated to petitioner as early as March. Ms. Chidley acknowledged receiving an email with those notes but had overlooked it. She stated she had reviewed the issues and plans to address them, possibly with the assistance of counsel.

The Court encouraged Ms. Chidley to consider seeking legal assistance and to contact the probate examiner with any questions.

The Court continued the matter to September 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time to correct deficiencies.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
